de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termgenerator

Interface TermGenerator

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AllowedCutPositionsGenerator, CutHeapObjectsTermGenerator, HeapGenerator, HeuristicInstantiation, MultiplesModEquationsGenerator, RootsGenerator, SequentFormulasGenerator, SubtermGenerator, SuperTermGenerator, SuperTermGenerator.SuperTermWithIndexGenerator, TriggeredInstantiations

    public interface TermGenerator
    Interface for objects that generate lists/sequences of terms or formulas. This interface is used in the feature ForEachCP in order to instantiate schema variables with different terms/formulas.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Iterator<Term> generate(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)

      • generate
